body:
## Problem
Three "drummer gear evolution" pages are live and sitemapped at priority 0.82 (from Issue #1475):
- `/drummers/lars-ulrich/evolution`
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/evolution`
- `/drummers/dave-lombardo/evolution`

These pages show decade-by-decade kit evolution (data: `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js`). They currently have:
- ✅ Sitemap entries (Issue #1475)
- ✅ SSR meta (Issue #1689)
- ❌ **ZERO `/llms/` markdown files** — `ls public/llms/evolution/` → directory does not exist

Distinct from:
- `/llms/gear-history.md` (top-level price-history hub — different content type)
- `/llms/gear-history/<slug>.md` (#1782 in ai-fix — covers PRICE history pages, NOT the evolution timeline)
- `/llms/drummers/<slug>.md` (per-drummer profile — has gear snapshot but no era-by-era timeline)

AI crawlers cannot answer "how did Lars Ulrich's drum kit change over time?" or "what kit did Joey Jordison use in the 1990s vs 2000s?" without these files.

## Files to create (3 new files)
```
public/llms/evolution/lars-ulrich.md
public/llms/evolution/joey-jordison.md
public/llms/evolution/dave-lombardo.md
```

## Done
3 `/llms/evolution/<slug>.md` files created for Lars Ulrich, Joey Jordison, Dave Lombardo; `api/sitemap.js` updated with 3 entries sourced from `DRUMMER_EVOLUTION` keys.

## Status: ALREADY APPLIED
Commit fcc01ce applied this fix. All 3 files exist with 1500+ words each, 4+ era sections, 6+ FAQ Q&As, and internal links. Sitemap entry present at api/sitemap.js line 544.
title: SEO batch: /llms/evolution/<slug>.md — 3 per-drummer gear evolution LLM files (Lars Ulrich, Joey Jordison, Dave Lombardo)
